prompt: Eye-level view, looking straight at a high-saturation 3D multi-layered paper carving scene. The overall colors are grayish-blue, creamy white, and deep forest green, accented with amber warm light. All elements must be physical paper layered structures, with hard-cut edges and clearly visible thick paper cross-sections. Extremely rich composition, a high-energy pirate group scene set in a chaotic sea adventure. Multiple stylized pirate characters are presented in exaggerated actions, with a young captain wearing a straw hat in the middle layer charging forward, surrounded by crew members with distinct poses. Layered ships, surging waves, and swirling currents run through the foreground, middle, and background, with multiple ships colliding and tilting in different spatial layers, sails torn, and flags flying. Silhouettes of giant opposing characters appear in the background layer to enhance the sense of oppression and spatial hierarchy. The foreground is filled with narrative elements: treasure chests, gold coins, maps, barrels, ropes, lanterns, and a wanted poster with a smiling pirate. A mascot-like small character is placed in the corner as a visual anchor. All atmospheric elements are presented in paper carving form: waves, splashes, smoke, debris, and movement lines, strengthening the chaos and sense of motion. The main subject is in the middle layer, with elements interacting across layers to express movement through overlap and spatial relationships. Soft light from a single direction creates clear inter-layer shadows. Overall matte paper texture, no glowing, no soft edges, no volumetric light. Octane render, 8K, clear details --ar 3:4 --stylize 450
